response: Christopher Nolan’s 2023 historical drama Oppenheimer has a runtime of 180 minutes, carried a $100 million production budget, and grossed over $952 million globally, earning critical acclaim with an 8.3 rating on IMDb and a 93% score on Rotten Tomatoes. The lauded film also took home the Academy Award for Best Picture, cementing its place as a standout award-winning entry in the drama and history genre.
